bird.name: Orange-billed nightingale-thrush
bird.summary: The orange-billed nightingale-thrush (Catharus aurantiirostris) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae, the thrushes and allies. It is…

locations.name: 得克萨斯州
locations.summary: Texas ( TEK-səss) is the most populous state in the Southern United States.

locations.name: 常綠森林
locations.summary: 常綠森林是由常綠樹木組成的森林。它們出現在廣泛的氣候帶中，包括寒冷氣候中的針葉樹和冬青樹等樹木，溫帶地區的桉樹、活橡樹、金合歡和班克樹，以及熱帶地區的雨林樹木。針葉溫帶常綠森林最常以科中的物種為主。樹木包括：松科和柏科。闊葉溫帶常綠森林包…

locations.summary: Pine–oak forest, pine–oak woodland, or oak–pine forest is a group of similar of ecosystems, primarily found in North an…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Orange-billed nightingale-thrush
relations.evidence: One bird was photographed in southern Texas in 1996. The other was photographed in South Dakota in 2010; the record was accepted by the South Dakota Ornithologists' Union. The orange-billed nightingale-thrush inhabits a variety of forest types in the upper tropical and subtropical zones

relations.subject: Orange-billed nightingale-thrush
relations.evidence: These include the edges of both lowland and montane evergreen forest and the interior of pine-oak forest, deciduous forest, and secondary forest. In Central and South America it also occurs in semi-deciduous forest, gardens, coffee plantations, and (at least in Venezuela) urban areas. Sources differ on its elevational range
